programme.title: Shoorveer
programme.desc: Siddharth is separated from his family as a child and he grows up hating his father. While his father tries to locate him, he ends up falling in love with Sitara and tries to win her heart.

programme.title: Citizen
programme.desc: Antony assumes several identities and kidnaps three government officials in order to succeed in his secret mission. However, a CBI officer sets out to find the real identity of the kidnapper.

programme.title: Operation Java
programme.desc: A team of police officers from the Kochi cyber cell embarks on a mission to investigate a series of mysterious crimes and unlawful activities.

programme.title: A Life Lived
programme.desc: After a childhood friend's death, Jake Taylor, an all-star athlete must change his life - and sacrifice his dreams to save the lives of others.

programme.title: Life after life
programme.desc: When journalist Masha finally gives up trying to find happiness with Dmitry, an older man who was also her boss, she falls for the much younger Yuri Kozakov - handsome, attentive and seemingly wealthy. But after a hasty marriage, Masha soon begins to notices strange things about Yuri's lifestyle and behaviour. When Yuri leaves for a business trip, Masha hears footsteps in the house and sees a dark shadow in the garden. Soon she will learn Yuri's horrible secret and become threatened by mortal danger, but if she cannot save herself, who will come to her aid in her hour of need?

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Photo ID
programme.desc: When Ania and Vlad married they were impoverished

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Rail_Kings_SD_4000kbps
programme.desc: An irresponsible preppie, Preston West, is presumed to have murdered his parents for a sizeable inheritance, so he flees to find the real killer, Phantom 13, a crazed freight train hobo! Riding speeding boxcars, Preston encounters hostile train yards, vicious railroad cops, hidden hobo jungles, mysterious Lacy, the notorious Baron and his colorful Hobo Gang. In a surprise ending, Preston finally confronts Phantom 13. Based on the controversial Hobo Times books.

programme.title: Beyond_HD_Mongolian_x264_15mbps
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Cuba_Crossing_x264_4000kb
programme.desc: Adventurer gets caught up in a plot to kill Fidel Castro.

programme.title: Ten_Soldiers_Of_Genghis_Khan_HD_Mongolian_x264_15mbps
programme.desc: This epic actioner features the relentless brave warriors from Genghis Khan's ten soldiers, as they are sent into the woods on a dangerous mission that will put the band of Mongol warriors on the edge of life and death.

programme.title: The Dirty Picture
programme.desc: A biographical drama film inspired by the life of South Indian actress Silk Smitha. The movie follows the journey of a young woman, who dreams of becoming a film star. It depicts her rise to fame in the film industry and politics, her turbulent personal life, and the challenges she faces as a woman in a male-dominated industry.

programme.title: Krishna Cottage
programme.desc: The movie revolves around a group of college students who visit a haunted house called "Krishna Cottage." As they unravel the mystery behind the house, they uncover dark secrets and a vengeful spirit that haunts them

programme.title: Mr White Mr Black
programme.desc: Before dying, Gopi's father asks him to find Kishen and hand over a piece of land. Gopi travels to Goa, where he is drawn into chaos by Kishen and his dangerous look-alike brother, the hoodlum Hari.

programme.title: Zameer
programme.desc: A spoiled brat gets married to her professor despite several challenges. Soon after, he learns that his wife was responsible for the separation of his ex-girlfriend and he leaves her, never to return.

programme.title: Sikka
programme.desc: Two close friends end up being enemies when one of them refuses to mend his ways.

programme.title: Devta
programme.desc: An ordinary taxi driver becomes part of a notorious gang through a twist of fate.

programme.desc: Shakti, an honest police officer, faces obstacles when he decides to punish his father's murderer.

programme.title: The Rock 100 of the 70s The Rock 100 of the 70s
programme.desc: Mark Goodier brings you our exclusive chart of the 100 biggest rock songs of the 70s, based on streaming data, historic sales info, and enduring global appeal. Crank this up LOUD!

programme.title: The 50s Revival! The 50s Revival!
programme.desc: They say music goes in cycles! Well for a period in the 70s we decided to celebrate all things 50s - go figure! From Racey, Mud, Darts & Showaddywaddy to the hit movie Grease.

programme.title: Sweet Soul Music! 1971-1979 Sweet Soul Music! 1971-1979
programme.desc: What a decade for soul singers, and this is 60 minutes of the very best. Including Stevie Wonder, Diana Ross, Barry White & The Stylistics.

programme.title: Yes Sir, I Can Boogie! 1975-1979 Yes Sir, I Can Boogie! 1975-1979
programme.desc: 2 hours of disco babes who ruled the dancefloors! From Labelle & Lipps Inc to Tina Charles & Sister Sledge - it's all girl singers, all the way!

programme.title: Who Did This First?! Top 40
programme.desc: Would you believe that these 40 massive melodies were originally sung by someone else! Find who did it first as we play hits by Soft Cell, Tina Turner, Phil Collins & Donna Summer.

programme.title: WOW! What A Party!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Easter's Biggest Hits: 1980-1989
programme.desc: What was in the top 5 during the Easter holiday in the 80s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1980 to 1989, with Madonna, David Bowie, Bros, The Jam, Culture Club and more!

programme.title: High School Rock Out: 1995-2005
programme.desc: We open the high school year book with Weezer in 1995 and remember the amazing bands that rocked every school party through to 2005!

programme.title: 50 Rock Heroes of the 00s!
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest heroes with the rock music that defined the 00s! Blink, MCR, Razorlight & Kings of Leon are all in the top 10 - but who's at number 1?

programme.title: Greatest Classic Rock Bands- Ever!
programme.desc: 30 years & 4 hours of classic rock bands, in order from 1965-1995! Expect to see The Stones, The Who, Joan Jett, Aerosmith, AC/DC, Queen, Genesis & The Beatles.

programme.desc: A playlist that pulls you in with a rush of fresh, sun-bright pop.

programme.desc: A playlist that rolls in bright and easy, like a wave you didn't see coming.

programme.desc: A playlist layered with bright rhythms and effortless confidence.

programme.title: After School Club: THE ASC 100 FINAL Ep.539

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.593
programme.desc: HeeJin, BAEK A YEON, Weeekly, Moon Jong Up, GIUK, OMEGA X, KISS OF LIFE, WHIB, Queenz Eye, eite, YOUNG POSSE

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.308
programme.desc: BAND NAH is comprised of guitarist and vocalist Nah Sang-hyun, drummer Kang Hyun-woong, and bassist PAIIEK. This 88io debuted in 2015 with the EP, “Tingling,” and has released about 90 songs since then. Impressively enough, their music is as diverse as it is prolific. They have been evolving in unpredictable ways every time while maintaining their delightful spirit - no wonder why they are highly sought after for concerts and festivals.In this episode, BAND NAH performs “Shine,” which they released early this year, “Love Love Love,” Spotlight“ featured on the sound88ack of ”Yumi's Cells,“ ”88,“ and ”1+1“ to showcase the essence of their musicality.

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.310
programme.desc: Isaac Hong made himself known to the public with his Yoo Jae-ha Music Contest-winning self-written song “Spring” in 2013. Since then, he has steadily built up his own musical world, marked by his trademark, mellow vocals and delicate sentiments. This time, he collaborated with renowned jazz pianist Sooyoung Chin to drop their project album, “Everland.” It is a mostly English-language album made through months of full collaboration, and the two describe it as “a record of their conversations over piano.” Using the common language of music, the two expanded their reach into each other's respective universes. Tune in to I'm LIVE and join their beautiful jazzy conversation!In this episode, Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin performs their songs “(n)everland,” “a bird,” “pages,” and also Hong's own pieces “Rain” and “Stay.”Joining us on this week's episode of I'm LIVE is Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin!

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.311
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's episode of I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter BOL4! BOL4 is An Ji-Yeong's one-person band, known for its adorable sounds and lyrics depicting spring, stars, cherry blossoms, and the universe. In April, BOL4 released its new album, “LOVE.zip,” illustrating various forms of love through the language of music. Following the release, An also held a concert and impressed the audience with her unique, silky voice as well as her growth as a musician. BOL4 is making a comeback on I'm LIVE for the first time in 4 years, marking its third appearance, with the first one in 2017 and the second in 2019. In this episode, BOL4 performs “FRIEND THE END, ”ROME,“ ”Red Lipstick,“ ”Stars over me,“ and more to show off her artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and enjoy this new extraordinary performance presented by An Ji-Yeong!

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.desc: Keshav lusts after glamorous Prema, while neighbour Dilruba eyes homely Kokila. Follows their misadventures in trying to get closer to each other's wives.

programme.title: W-Two Worlds Apart
programme.desc: A Love Story Between A Couple In Their Early Thirties. They Belong To The Same Era But Alternate Realities. A Surgical Resident Is Pulled Into The Webtoon World Of W, Which Was Created By Her Father, And Becomes Entangled In A Murder Mystery

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Extra Ordinary
programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Money Flower
programme.desc: Money Flower tells the story of people who are driven by greed. Kang Pil-Joo (Jang Hyuk) grew up at an orphanage, but he now works as a managing director of a legal team at a corporation.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Ten Me
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.title: Mother
programme.desc: A temporary teacher at an elementary school realizes that one of her students is being abused at home by her family.

programme.title: K Chat
programme.desc: K Chat

programme.title: Medical Top Team
programme.desc: Follows the journey of creating Korea's best multidisciplinary medical team and the stories of doctors inside. Characters who have different hurts and dilemmas struggle as they get to work together and gradually learn that healing a person is healing oneself.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Ten Me
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants an ice cream cone from the ice cream van.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean is feeling down when everyone forgot his birthday.

programme.title: HARAPARVATI
programme.desc: This movie, based on the story by Mahakavi Kalidas, likely portrays the mythological narrative of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati, focusing on their divine love, union, and cosmic significance, often including tales of their courtship and challenges.

programme.title: INDRANI
programme.desc: A father educates his daughter who marries and faces hardships eventually reconciling with her husband after separation.

programme.title: BIJOYA DASHAMI
programme.desc: Middle-aged woman goes missing investigation reveals shocking truth and a gripping twist.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.10
programme.desc: Kang Chi and Yeo Wool are trapped in the room where the silver chest is hidden. Seo-bwagwan grows suspicious of the wall hidden behind a scroll. Meanwhile, seeing Yeo Wool's scar, Kang Chi remembers his childhood encounter with her.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.11
programme.desc: Kang Chi is asked by Tae Seo to rescue Chung Jo. He worries about how Chung Jo will react to his half-beast nature. Yeo Wool comforts him, saying he is still Choi Kang Chi, regardless of his appearance. Meanwhile, the Hundred Year Inn staff hear that Chung Jo is to spend the night with Jo Gwan Woong.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.12
programme.desc: To save Chung Jo, Tae Seo reveals Kang Chi's location to Jo Gwan Woong. Tae Seo attempts to behead Kang Chi himself and cuts off his prayer bead bracelet. Kang Chi transforms into his beast form in front of Tae Seo and Chung Jo. Seo-bwagwan, sensing Kang Chi is Wol Ryung and Seo Hwa's son, reports this to Jo Gwan Woong.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.13
programme.desc: Yeo Wool is put in charge of Kang Chi's discipline at the school. Despite their bickering, they grow closer and go to see the lantern festival. Meanwhile, unusual corpses are found in the forest, and the school's disciples begin to suspect Kang Chi.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.14
programme.desc: Kang Chi and Yeo Wool enjoy the lantern festival. However, when a disciple is found dead with his liver eaten, Kang Chi falls under deeper suspicion. Tae Seo returns to the inn and tells Jo Gwan Woong about Yi Sun Shin's plan to build a new 'ironclad' ship.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.15
programme.desc: Yeo Wool encounters Gu Wol Ryung in the forest and is terrified. Wol Ryung tells her that Dam Pyung Joon is the one who killed Kang Chi's father. Rumors spread that Kang Chi is the son of a gumiho. Jo Gwan Woong declares that Kang Chi is responsible for the murders in the forest.

programme.title: Rangoo On The Run
programme.desc: While Baloo chases glutton bird Rangoo for a huge ripe mango, it accidentally falls and the emerald, offered as birthday present to monkey queen Masha by the black cobra which guards the temple ruin treasure, gets caught in it. Baloo is kept hostage, forced to massage the monkey tyrant, while Mowgli follows the bird to return the gem as ransom for his bear friend. Mowgli succeeds and the pair of them even gets to enjoy the lavishly fruit-supplied party.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Invention Story
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron throws garbage all around Car City. Rodeo and Booster merge, but Zitron overpowers them. Gary joins them to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Robo needs to find Zitron and stop the dinosaur terrorising Car City before it causes any more chaos.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron blocked the road with mud, and cars are getting stuck! Rodeo and Booster merge in an attempt to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: It' s Rodeo' s birthday! Zitron' s present—a flying shark—goes wild and turns on the guests. Robo comes to the rescue with Carrie' s help.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: It's Ben's Parade in Car City. Zitron escapes from jail, planning to ruin the fun, but Robo foils his plan.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: The Great Escapes
programme.desc: Dive into a world of action, drama, determination and courage while reliving the greatest escape stories of our time in an all new mini-series ‘The Great Escape'.The show is based on true events and takes you on a thrilling ride of the most daring escapes from Indian history. Some of the stories covered in the series include Sushmita Banerjee's escape from the Taliban in Afghanistan, Dalai Lama's escape from Tibet, the story of a daring jailbreak by the inmates of a jail in Punjab, and Indian prisoner-of-war Nihal Singh and Ram Chander Yadav's escape from the clutches of the Chinese in the Indo-China war. The mini-series even has some comments from the people who made these exhilarating escapes, including the Dalai Lama himself. Each episode takes you to different locations across varied time periods. The stylizations of those eras, mixed with the thrill of escape keeps you hooked till the end.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.desc: Faced with an epic flood in Bangkok, Thailand, the hunters search for stowaway vipers, catch dragons downtown, and try to track down one of the world's longest snakes.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: Continuing their reptile rescue mission in flood-ravaged Thailand, the hunters dig for deadly cobras, wrestle a mammoth crocodile, and head to higher ground hoping to find a Burmese python in its native habitat.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Yucatan Sinkhole, Shark Biology and Ocean Defenses
programme.desc: Blue World explores a spooky sinkhole in Mexico, investigates the world of shark biology and illustrates the way animals defend themselves in the ocean.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Blind Cavefish, Coral Reefs and Bottom-dwelling sharks
programme.desc: Blue World searches for an elusive blind cavefish in Mexico, investigates the biology of coral reefs, and explores the world of bottom-dwelling sharks.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Sailfish, Potato Cod and Diver Ed
programme.desc: Blue World films one of the world's fastest fish, visits Australia to investigate a huge fish on the Great Barrier Reef, and travels to Maine to meet Diver Ed…an underwater wildlife expert.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Manta Ray Feeding Frenzy and Sea Snakes of Bird Island
programme.desc: Blue World travels to the Maldives to witness a huge Manta ray feeding frenzy and then visits Indonesia to explore an island surrounded by venomous sea snakes!

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Bull Sharks and Inner Space at NASA
programme.desc: Blue World travels to Mexico for an up-close encounter with Bull sharks and then visits NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston where astronauts train underwater for space walking.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: Despite popularity, it seems the future does not bode well for the penguins, finding themselves in a shrinking world of melting snow and ice. However, they remain on the shores of our beaches and on the unforgiving Antarctic ice shelves and oceans.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: Bears today are divided into 8 species with some considered the largest land predators, though many are in fact omnivorous. They survive in our grasslands and mountains, tropical jungles and the cold harsh climate of the Artic.

programme.title: Downey's Dream Cars: The Thanos Thumper
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr. converts his K10 truck to an all-electric he test-drives two electric cars, including the world's fastest-accelerating production car.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou swap out the DZ302 engine of an original numbers-matching Z28 with a Chevrolet small-block engine.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou replace a one-piece floor panel on a 1955 Chevrolet Nomad wagon.

programme.title: Extreme Car Hoarders: A Hoard, a Van and a Plan
programme.desc: Chuck and Rick get a tip about a hoard of Corvettes, but their dreams may be dashed when they actually see the hoard.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The owner of a '70s El Camino wants an interior makeover, so the girls get rid of the bench seat design and put in a set of new bucket seats with a center console.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared gets the chance to build his dream project, but learns that time is not on his side.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared completely redesigns the tail section of the '71 Camaro.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has 12 weeks until his baby boy is due, and the same amount of time to fulfill a childhood fantasy, to own a 1950s Alfa 158 but since he doesn't have $20 million lying around, he's going to build it.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has found a donor 1950s chassis, so his ambitious Alfa 158 build can now begin digging deep into his passion for the early years of Formula One racing.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Bogi finds an M-3 BMW she wants to buy for herself the AGG Team will need to rebuild the brakes, bleed the clutch, install a new radiator and rework the front-end with new headlights.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The AGG team takes a Scat Pack Challenger and adds a prototype twin turbo kit the team then beefs up the rear-end with new axles.

programme.title: Downey's Dream Cars: The Thanos Thumper
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr. converts his K10 truck to an all-electric he test-drives two electric cars, including the world's fastest-accelerating production car.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Giants of San Benedicto” features Dr. Robert Rubin and his ground-breaking research of giant Mantas. You'll travel to the remote Socorro Islands off Mexico's Pacific coast and see breath-taking encounters with enormous manta rays.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Because of its isolated habitat, little is known about the Galapagos Shark and its behaviors. And that's enough to get Shark Gordon interested, catching and tagging a group of the sharks to help…

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Explore some of the 129 species of ocean mammals from groups of cetaceans, sirenians, pinnipeds and fissipeds.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Giants of San Benedicto” features Dr. Robert Rubin and his ground-breaking research of giant Mantas. You'll travel to the remote Socorro Islands off Mexico's Pacific coast and see breath-taking encounters with enormous manta rays.

programme.title: Shark Gordon

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Safari Flix

Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Squirting Clams Pulled Up from the Muck!
programme.desc: Clams that squirt? Mark explores tidal flats where strange mollusks shoot water as a defense mechanism. It's weirder than you think.Bloodworms have teeth and aren't afraid to use them. Mark gets bitten and reveals why these creepy crawlers are misunderstood.

programme.title: Making a Crabby Tide Pool Aquarium in New England!
programme.desc: Mark builds a tide pool aquarium along the New England coast and fills it with crabs and marine critters. It's hands-on science at its best.The vampire fish lives up to its name. Coyote gets bitten and shows the terrifying teeth and feeding behavior of this river predator.

programme.title: Eaten Alive by Sea Lamprey!
programme.desc: The sea lamprey is a nightmare with a mouth full of teeth. Coyote experiences what it's like to be eaten alive—literally.Coyote explores a recently abandoned grizzly bear cave, uncovering signs of the massive predator's presence in a thrilling and suspenseful wilderness episode.

programme.title: Area 51 Plane Crash – We Found It!
programme.desc: Mark explores a remote crash site in the desert rumored to be tied to Area 51. What he finds is strange, twisted, and possibly historic.Man O' War jellyfish are not true jellyfish—but they're still deadly. Mark gets stung and showcases their long, venomous tentacles.

programme.title: We Found Rare T‑Rex Teeth!
programme.desc: Coyote uncovers T-Rex teeth during a fossil hunt. Rare, real, and awe-inspiring, this one's for the dino lovers.

programme.title: Will It Bite?! – Giant Bloodsucking Parasite!
programme.desc: A giant bloodsucking parasite—will it bite? Coyote takes the risk to learn how these creatures latch onto hosts and extract blood.

programme.title: My Precious! – Coyote Goes Full Gollum!
programme.desc: Channeling his inner Gollum, Coyote becomes obsessed with a strange find in the wild. This lighthearted episode brings out his wildest side.

programme.title: Poison Ivy Smoothie – Big Mistake!
programme.desc: Coyote blends poison ivy into a smoothie to test a myth. Spoiler: bad idea. This wild episode mixes humor with a powerful message about plant toxicity.Roaches take over—literally. Coyote faces a nightmare infestation right on his head, exploring how these pests behave and thrive in close quarters.

programme.title: Stung by a Venomous Neon Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The neon caterpillar's venom isn't just a defense—it's a chemical marvel. Coyote experiences its sting firsthand.Who's faster—Coyote or the world's fastest animal? He sets up a high-stakes race to test reflexes, speed, and a bit of humility.

programme.title: Inked by a Tattoo Needle!
programme.desc: Coyote faces manys fear... Getting a tatoo!Caring for a miniature pony is no small job! Coyote visits a farm and learns the basics of grooming, feeding, and why these tiny horses need special care.

programme.title: Snapping Turtle vs. Hand: Will It Break?!
programme.desc: Snapping turtles are no joke, but can they actually break bone? Coyote puts his own hand (and nerves) on the line to find out.The stinging nettle may look harmless, but it hides a nasty surprise. Coyote experiences the sting and explains its effects and remedies.

programme.title: Insane Urban Beehive Extraction – You Won't Believe This!
programme.desc: Urban beekeeping gets extreme as Coyote removes a huge hive from a populated area. Flying stings and swarming bees make it a wild ride.What does a snake bite look like in slow motion? Coyote captures the full strike in ultra-HD to showcase precision and danger.

programme.title: Lake Erie Monster – Is It Real?!
programme.desc: Is the Lake Erie Monster real? Coyote dives into folklore, interviews, and lake searches to investigate the mystery behind the legend.Chiggers are tiny but brutal. Coyote takes one for the team to show what their bites look like and how to avoid the fiery aftermath.

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by South Korea - Jicama Kimchi, Russia - Roasted Eggplant Salad, Spain - Quinoa Paella, and El Salvador - Salvadorian Grilled Iceberg Lettuce Wedge!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Indonesia - Tomato Nasi Goreng, Greece - Greek Melon Salad, Syria - Kidney Bean Hummus, and Thailand - Coconut Curry Cabbage Rolls!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Sweden - Swedish Turnips and Granola, Mexico - Radicchio Tacos, Senegal - Cashew-Sweeth Potato Maafe, and Italy - Bok Choy Fusili!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by South Africa - Braaied Rapini, Iceland - Cold Icelandic Pepper Soup, Bangladesh - Edamame Jhalmuri, and Spain - Spanish Broccoli Tortilla!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Filled with ruins in its bustling streets, the region of Lazio sticks with grandeur in all it does, including food! To introduce us to Lazio, Host Michael Bonacini highlights its Jewish influence with a crispy Roman Jewish-style Artichokes. As crunchy as a potato chip, Michael's artichokes are a delicious fried treat that are a perfect way to kick off a delicious meal. For his primo Michael brings together simple ingredients to create a rich Bucatini with Amatriciana Sauce. Michael's secondo turns what was once peasant food into a delectable and tender dish. Cooked with a blend of vegetables and sauce, Michael's Braised Oxtail brings forth the history of cuisine. Returning to Rome for his final dish, Michael cooks up the popular Sour Cherry and Ricotta Tart. With the tart cherries countered by the creamy ricotta, every decadent bite offers a world of taste.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Campania's beautiful coastline is filled with two things: tourists and seafood. Diving into the culture of the region, Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini begins his meal with a salad from the Island of Capri. Putting a twist on the classic dish, Michael's Grilled Caprese Salad combines fresh tomatoes, tangy balsamic, and a hint of sweetness from basil. For his primo, Michael serves up bold flavours with his Spaghetti Puttanesca. Mixing salty and sweet, this sauce offers a delicious take on the typical plate of spaghetti. Looking to the coast for his secondo, Michael quickly cooks up aromatic and spicy Herb-stuffed Scallops and Grilled Broccoli Rabe. For his dolce Michael whips up a dessert made for a celebration: Rum Babas. Typically for special occasions, each bite of Rum Babas offers pure sweetness with a fresh citrus zest.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini delves into the Italian region of Emilia- Romagna to discover its iconic cuisine. To start, Michael stays light with an airy Mortadella Mousse spread on fluffy Modena Mini Flatbreads. Next, Michael cooks up Tortellini in Broth, a dish originally from Bologna that can be easily altered to personal taste. Michael chooses to fill his tortellini with a rich and savoury mixture of prosciutto, mortadella, and ground pork. For his secondo, Michael uses traditional ingredients and pairs them in a tart, luxurious dish of Duck Breast with Balsamic Cherry Sauce. To wind down his meal, Michael whips up a creamy classic, Rice Custard Cake topped with a Cherry Glaze.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI TAKES THE STATES 2022 hits the road for another epic adventure
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology - Colour change with the power of thought - The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range_en
programme.sub-title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan embarks on a two wheeled journey over the highest roads in the world, stopping in remote monasteries to learn the secrets of Buddhism's warrior demons and track down a secreted manuscript rumored to explain the lost years of Jesus.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: From the pink city to the blue city, our host weaves his way through citadels, dunes and temples in this legendary frontierland of kings. He braves the rat temple in search of the lucky albino rodent and hears the epic of cow hearding Gods.

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: The real Madagascar has no talking lions, zebras or hippos. What it does have is the most unique collection of plants and animals anywhere on earth. Bill fights the nearly inaccessible land to find a rare lemur that dances and another one that sings.

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: There is nothing on earth that compares to Mongolia. Here the last nomadic people range their livestock over millions of acres of grasslands. Drinking fermented mare's milk (worst tasting drink ever), riding a yak and finding the original wild horses

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: The crew takes an icebreaker to the North Pole just in time to make a satellite phone call to wish Bill's mother a happy birthday (she is so shocked she doesn't recognize him). We also track and film the biggest predators on earth…polar bears.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: India: Can Kolkata be considered a foodie destination of India?
programme.desc: Liesel pinballs around a city known for its gastronomy, the forgotten hub of British East India trading company, Kolkata. From trying out what the bustling city's vibrant street food scene has to offer, to the lesser known gems, including, venturing into India's only Chinatown and sampling their delicacies. A tale of walking food tours, hole in the wall joints serving up North Eastern dumplings, messy fish markets, and of course, the pride of Bengal, the Hilsa fish. Is Kolkata up to par with the other major metropolitan cities of India? This episode finds out exactly that!

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: Nevada: What else is there in Nevada for foodies besides Vegas?
programme.desc: This investigative mission starts off in the sin city atmosphere of the Vegas strip. After a gluttonous stint at a generic buffet, Liesel is inspired to do a road trip to find iconic gems in the state of Nevada. From ghost towns, to monstrous foodie challenges, to hole in the wall dive bars in the middle of nowhere, this trip has it all. Liesel finds the resurgence of Basque cuisine in Northern Nevada, and learns that Reno can do fine dining as well! A trip to Virginia city also reveals that the Silver State has some haunted bars where patrons from the 1800s are rumored to be still imbibing and spooking locals! It's a road trip in every sense of the word!

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: Rome: What are the tourists missing out on?
programme.desc: Italy is a vacationer's paradise. The food, the people, the sights and sounds, the history! But are the tourists doing it right when it comes to the trying out authentic food in Rome? Liesel embarks on a mission to explore the street food of the city. With the help of her food journalist buddy, Saverio de Luca, Liesel sifts through pasticceri, food festivals, touristed hotspots, all in an effort to understand real Roman food.

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: Bill tracks through never ending mud, heavy vegetation and steep mountains, to come face-to-face with our mighty cousins. He also traces the life, and finds the remnants, of the camp of one of his idols - Diane Fossey.

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: Botswana is a wildlife lover's dream with massive herds of elephants, immense pods of hippos and some of the largest prides of lions anywhere. It's also the home of Victoria Falls…the largest falls in the world.

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: Bill has always been fascinated with the Americas Cup yacht racing – it's as intense as the name implies. But the big adventure is riding in, and then flying, a Soviet Mig Jet doing stunts and mind numbing close fly-bys.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: With a tank full of gas donated by a “would-be traveler”, Leon and Kindness One® leave LA and try their luck in Sin City before finding help from a Scotsman in an out of the way Western town in Colorado, inspires his first surprise gift.

programme.title: Home Rescue

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: Duncan presents Fresh local Oysters on the bow of a boat in Crystal blue waters, visits a small communal island, and lends a hand at one of Krabi's leading cooking schools.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Erin and Ryan are an active, eco-conscious and newly engaged couple with little time to think about decorating their living space. They moved into this open-concept condo in December of 2008 before building was complete. Though Erin likes French, frilly, feminine pieces and Ryan prefers furnishings that are sleek, modern and shiny, they rarely disagree about how to decorate and often find a compromise.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Paula, Pete and their 2 children, Ava (9) and Eric (13) moved back to Toronto from Vancouver in August. They bought a house that needed a little work and have made minor adjustments to it to make it feel like home. But there's one space that has them stumped - the master bedroom. They know it has so much potential, but they just can't find a way to make it work.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
